title: tragacantha fruticosa
intro: Tragacantha fruticosa, also known as the needle bush or stick tight, is a spiny shrub native to the Mediterranean region. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, such as constipation and diarrhea, due to its anthraquinone content. The plant's health benefits include its ability to stimulate bowel movements, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Tragacantha fruticosa can be prepared as a herbal tea, powder, or extract, often used in traditional medicine to alleviate digestive problems and promote overall well-being.
